content: Connie Abernathy: You ever fuck in the tato fields, Cait? Dusty as hell, but there’s somethin’ primal about gettin’ railed with the stalks scratchin’ your ass while some raider’s brains dry on MJR’s boots nearby. Cait: Fuck yeah, Connie. MJR bent me over a radroach carcass last week, gun still warm in his hand from blazin’ through a pack of those synth-lovin’ cunts. My cunt dripped like a busted coolant pipe. You ever taste gunpowder on your man’s fingers after he’s painted the walls with raider guts? Connie Abernathy: Blake’s more a plowin’ man than a shootin’ one, but fuck if I don’t miss the days when raiders tried to take this farm. Used to ride him right on the porch, watchin’ their corpses rot while he buried his cock in me. Now it’s just settler politics and these weak-kneed caravanners cryin’ about “safe trade routes.

Cait: Fuckin’ hell, Connie, you still up at this hour? Saw you bending over them tatos earlier—gettin’ any action from Blake or you just lettin’ that ripe cunt ache? Connie Abernathy: Oh, honey, Blake’s snorin’ like a Brahmin after I rode him raw for the third time tonight. Ain’t no farmer’s wife goin’ hungry in  bed. But shit, Cait, I saw you eye-fuckin’ MJR by the water pump. You let that man wreck that tight little Irish pussy yet? Cait: Hah! Like you wouldn’t believe. Took him right up against a rusted car frame near Dunwich, blood still drippin’ off his hands from gutting raiders. Fuckin’ primal. But Christ, Connie, you ever get tired of this synth-lovin’, Ghoul-fuckin’ political bullshit? Diamond City’s so busy suckin’ Institute cock they forgot what a  human looks like. Connie Abernathy: Preach it, sister.

Cait: Gotta love seein’ Piper throwin’ drinks around like she’s got a death wish. No wonder MJR keeps her around—she’s got spirit. Connie Abernathy: Spirits ain’t all she’s got, if the way she moans behind closed doors is any indication. Little minx’s got stamina, I’ll give her that. Cait: Heh. Between her, me, and MJR? That bunk’s seen more action than a Gunners’ barracks. Now where the hell’d that idiot drop his Stimpak? I ain't patchin' him up twice in one night.
